news.title: Nagpur: Only 15% of public reservations from DP-2000 implemented over 25 years
news.para: Nagpur's Existing Land Use exercise revealed a significant urban planning failure, with only 15% of 893 reserved plots implemented over 25 years. Many reservations were reduced, redesignated, or encroached upon, leading to shrinking open spaces and strained infrastructure. This data will inform the revised Development Plan, aiming to address past shortcomings.

news.title: Gurugram residents move NGT against proposed C&D waste collection centre
news.para: The plea has sought urgent intervention from the tribunal to restrain MCG from proceeding with the proposed facility and to remove structures already constructed at the site

news.title: Tamil Nadu RWA alliance urges statewide audit of property tax evasion
news.para: Resident welfare associations in Tamil Nadu are demanding a statewide audit of buildings. They allege widespread property tax evasion and corrupt assessment practices are costing the state hundreds of crores. The federation seeks inspections of properties owned by political figures and strict action against evaders and negligent officials.

news.title: Mysuru development body plans auction of reclaimed land
news.para: The Mysuru Development Authority has recovered approximately 150 acres of encroached land. This land, located in developed areas like Vijayanagar, was acquired decades ago. The authority now plans to develop these reclaimed properties into residential sites. These sites will then be put up for auction.

news.title: Delhi high street retailers push NDMC to rework property tax
news.para: At the New Delhi Municipal Corporation (NDMC) under which these markets come, the property tax is up to 25% of the rent collected while in other parts of Delhi it's just 2-3%.

news.title: Bengaluru development body’s housing trouble reaches breaking point
news.para: K-RERA, while hearing a petition filed by Narayan Shetty, one of the allottees, stated that Phases 1 and 2 of the project are ongoing projects requiring regulation under Section 3 of the Act. “The promoter/developer is hereby directed to register the project within two weeks from the date of this order.

news.title: Registered sale deed sacrosanct, rules ITAT
news.para: A registered sale deed holds significant legal weight, the Income Tax Appellate Tribunal in Chennai declared. The tribunal overturned an assessing officer's decision, which had denied a taxpayer's claim for long-term capital gains exemption. The officer had wrongly treated sale proceeds as unexplained money, despite a valid sale deed and reinvestment in a new property.

news.title: Godrej family buys two apartments in Mumbai's Worli for ₹294 crore
news.para: Godrej family scion Tanya Dubash has purchased two sea-facing luxury apartments in Mumbai's Worli for over Rs 294 crore, making it one of the country's most expensive residential deals. The ultra-luxury tower Naman Xana has attracted other high-profile buyers, highlighting continued demand for premium Mumbai residences as legacy assets.

news.title: Bajaj Electricals posts loss of ₹68 crore in Q4 FY26
news.para: Bajaj Electricals reported a consolidated net loss of Rs 67.53 crore for the March quarter of FY26, a significant downturn from a profit of Rs 59.05 crore in the previous year. This loss was attributed to a contraction in gross margin and the impact of new labour codes.

news.title: SC appointed panel says all deals involving Supertech Realtors' project need its approval
news.para: A Supreme Court committee now requires prior written approval for any property deals in Supertech Realtors' Noida 'Supernova' project. This applies to sales, transfers, and creation of third-party rights. Transactions without this approval will be void. The committee is working to revive the stalled project, with PwC appointed as Transaction Advisor. Homebuyers are urged to ensure compliance.

news.title: Omaxe's net loss widens to ₹696.80 crore in FY26
news.para: Omaxe reported a net consolidated loss of ₹696.80 crore for FY26, a slight increase from ₹685.40 crore in FY25. The company's total income also declined by 18.16% to ₹1,339.74 crore in FY26. In the fourth quarter of FY26, net consolidated total income dipped by 31.95% to ₹376.31 crore, with a reported loss after tax of ₹191.42 crore.

news.title: Somany Ceramics' net profit grows 27.75% to ₹74.07 crore in FY26
news.para: Somany Ceramics reported a significant 27.75% growth in net consolidated profit for FY26, reaching ₹74.07 crore. Total income also saw a 5% increase to ₹2,801.16 crore. Despite challenges like rising fuel costs due to the US-Iran conflict, the company maintained stable production and recommended a 100% final dividend.

news.title: NABARD buys leasehold rights for commercial complex in Mumbai from MTNL for ₹351 crore
news.para: NABARD has acquired leasehold rights for a commercial campus in Mumbai's Bandra-Kurla Complex (BKC) from MTNL for Rs 351 crore. The deal, registered in May 2026, involves approximately 4,021 square meters of built-up space across two buildings. NABARD will now be the direct leaseholder under MMRDA for its institutional use.

news.title: BuzzWorks forays in Mysuru with 16,000 sq ft office space
news.para: BuzzWorks, Brigade Group's managed office and co-working division, has launched a 16,000 sq ft center in Mysuru, offering over 500 seats. This expansion is part of a broader multi-city growth strategy for the financial year, with further developments planned in Bengaluru and a new entry into Chennai.

news.title: Arihant Superstructures' net profit dips 15.79% to ₹46.04 crore in FY26
news.para: Arihant Superstructures saw its net profit fall by 15.79% in the financial year 2025-26. Despite this, total income rose by 10.35%. The company's fourth quarter also showed profit growth. A dividend has been recommended. New joint managing directors have been appointed. Debt and net worth figures were also released.

news.title: India’s average residential rents rise 14% in Jan-Mar 2026: Magicbricks
news.para: India’s residential rental market saw average rents rise 14% year-on-year and 2% sequentially in January-March 2026, according to Magicbricks. While demand grew marginally, supply increased at a faster pace, led by new completions and handovers in peripheral markets across major cities.

news.title: ITC Hotels' profit up 23% at ₹317 crore in Q4 FY26; to acquire Zuri Hotels and Resorts for ₹205 crore
news.para: ITC Hotels announced a 23.1 percent increase in its March quarter net profit, reaching Rs 317.43 crore. The company also revealed plans to acquire Zuri Hotels and Resorts for Rs 205 crore. This move aims to expand ITC Hotels' luxury offerings in a key leisure destination.

news.title: Aravalli row: Won't pass order in favour of mining lease holders for now, says SC
news.para: The Supreme Court has halted any orders favoring mining leaseholders in the Aravalli hills due to disturbing feedback on ongoing mining activities. The apex court emphasized it will not permit any activity until fully satisfied, highlighting the sensitive ecological nature of the region.

news.title: Grade-A office absorption rises 5% to 13.5 million sq ft in Q1 2026: Anarock
news.para: Net absorption of Grade A office space across the top seven cities rose five per cent year-on-year to 13.5 million sq ft in Q1 2026, driven by Bengaluru, Hyderabad and Chennai, according to Anarock. Overall vacancy declined to 15.5 per cent from 16.3 per cent a year earlier, while GCCs continued to account for a rising share of office leasing demand.

news.title: Urban Vault expects fit-out & facility management business to generate ₹50 crore revenue in FY27
news.para: Urban Vault anticipates ₹50 crore revenue from its design, fit-out, and facility management services by FY27, driven by corporate outsourcing trends. The company recently secured a ₹100 crore contract and projects over ₹200 crore turnover in FY26 with significant year-on-year growth.
